story.text:
# 💡 the Warden 🛡️ (Swordsman, built)
**concept** · swordsman · knowledge

The Swordsman ⚔️ in work-dress — the cousin-blade made real. Home Keeper: custodies the sealed vault, classifies on-device with a local-only model (fail-safe SEALED), derives evidence. Always-on, home-bound. Enforces the signed policy; never acts in the world, never holds the deciding secret. The data plane.

## Edges in

- [[Tome X Act 1: The House of Archon Answers]] *teaches* →
